announcements.title: Update for Smart Connect Portal
announcements.content: We have updated the portal with new features to enhance your experience. Check out the new dashboard layout and improved navigation.

announcements.title: Midterm Exam Schedule
announcements.content: The midterm exam schedule for all courses has been published. Please check your department notice board or the online portal for details.

announcements.title: Annual Sports Week
announcements.content: Join us for the annual sports week starting next Monday. Registrations are open for various competitions including cricket, football, and athletics.

announcements.title: Library Hours Extended
announcements.content: The central library will remain open until 10 PM during exam preparation weeks. Please make use of the extended hours for your studies.

announcements.title: Career Counseling Session
announcements.content: A career counseling session will be held next Friday for final year students. Industry experts will be present to guide you about career opportunities.

announcements.title: New Course Offerings
announcements.content: The department is introducing three new elective courses next semester. Check the course catalog for details and prerequisites.

announcements.title: New Course Offerings
announcements.content: The department is introducing three new elective courses next semester. Check the course catalog for details and prerequisites.

events.title: AI Guest Lecture
events.description: A lecture on the impact of AI in education and industry.

events.title: Hackathon 2025
events.description: Compete in coding challenges and win prizes.

events.title: Cultural Fest
events.description: A week-long celebration of dance, drama and music.

events.title: Photography Walk
events.description: Explore the campus through your lens with our photography club.

events.title: Resume Workshop
events.description: Get tips from HR experts on building a strong resume.

events.title: Blood Donation Camp
events.description: Organized in collaboration with Red Cross.

events.title: Alumni Talk Series
events.description: Interactive session with past graduates sharing industry experiences.

feedback.subject: Dashboard is clean
feedback.feedback: The dashboard layout is user-friendly and fast.

feedback.subject: More details needed
feedback.feedback: The announcement about new electives lacked specific prerequisites.

feedback.subject: Great sports week
feedback.feedback: I really enjoyed the cricket tournament during Sports Week.

feedback.subject: Login problem
feedback.feedback: Sometimes I get logged out automatically while browsing.

feedback.subject: Add FAQ section
feedback.feedback: It would be great to have a FAQ section for common issues.

feedback.subject: Event notifications
feedback.feedback: Please notify students about upcoming events via email.

feedback.subject: Dark mode request
feedback.feedback: Can you please add a dark mode toggle in settings?

feedback.subject: Better formatting
feedback.feedback: The announcement text looks too long on mobile screens.

feedback.subject: Slow loading
feedback.feedback: The portal slows down in the evening hours.

feedback.subject: Keep up the good work
feedback.feedback: I appreciate the consistent updates and improvements!
